description: Style NoteLush and sensual, Truth calvin klein comes in a smart and sleek bottle and features scents of bamboo, patchouli, sapling, vetiver, white peony, wet woods, white clover, acacia, bio-vanilla, musk, silk-tree flower and white amber.  Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
